---
name: Accessibility issue
description: Report an accessibility problem with the site
title: "Accessibility: "
labels: [accessibility]
assignees: []
---

## What accessibility problem did you encounter?

Describe what happened and what made the page difficult to use.

## Page or URL

Paste the page URL, if available.

## Device / Browser / Assistive Tech

Examples: iPhone Safari, Android Chrome, VoiceOver, NVDA, keyboard-only navigation, screen magnifier.

## What would have helped?

Describe the change that would make this easier to use.

## Additional context

Screenshots, recordings, or extra notes are welcome if you are comfortable sharing them.
